// Mod Menu Code Generated by Manus AI
// Style: Custom Hook Style from hook.txt
// Game: Based on dump.cs analysis

#include <stdint.h>

// Structs
struct Vector3 {
    float x, y, z;
    static Vector3 Zero() { return {0, 0, 0}; }
};

struct Quaternion {
    float x, y, z, w;
};

struct monoString {
    void* klass;
    void* monitor;
    int length;
    char chars[1];
};

// External Helper
extern uintptr_t EspGetAbsoluteAddress(uintptr_t offset);

// --- Original Hooks from hook.txt ---

static void LineRenderer_SetPosition(void *Render, int value, Vector3 Location){ 
    void (*_LineRenderer_SetPosition)(void *Render, int value, Vector3 Location) = (void (*)(void*, int, Vector3))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x19F0460); 
    return _LineRenderer_SetPosition(Render, value, Location); 
} 

static void LineRenderer_Set_PositionCount(void *Render, int value){ 
    void (*_LineRenderer_Set_PositionCount)(void *Render, int value) = (void (*)(void*, int))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x19F03C0); 
    return _LineRenderer_Set_PositionCount(Render, value); 
} 

static void GrenadeLine_DrawLine(void *instance, Vector3 start, Vector3 end, Vector3 position) { 
    void (*_GrenadeLine_DrawLine)(void *clz, Vector3 throwPos, Vector3 throwVel, Vector3 gravity) = (void (*)(void*, Vector3, Vector3,Vector3)) EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xBDD080); 
    return _GrenadeLine_DrawLine(instance, start, end, position); 
} 

static Vector3 GetAttackableCenterWS(void *player) {
    Vector3 (*_GetAttackableCenterWS)(void *players) = (Vector3 (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x504068);
    return _GetAttackableCenterWS(player);
}

static void *CurrentUIScene() {
    void *(*_CurrentUIScene)(void *nuls) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xB2DA80);
    return _CurrentUIScene(NULL);
}

static monoString *U3DStr(const char *str) {
    monoString *(*String_CreateString)(void *_this, const char *str) = (monoString * (*)(void *, const char *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x15728D8);
    return String_CreateString(NULL, str);
}

static void ShowPopupMessages(monoString *nick) {
    void (*_ShowPopupMessage)(void *players, monoString * nicks, float duration) = (void (*)(void *, monoString *, float))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x176A6C4);
    void *ui = CurrentUIScene();
    if (ui != NULL) {
        _ShowPopupMessage(ui, nick, 500.1f);
    }
}

static bool IsCrouching(void *player) {
    bool (*_IsCrouching)(void *players) = (bool (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x4D7E24);
    return _IsCrouching(player);
}

static bool IsFiring(void *player) {
    bool (*_IsFiring)(void *players) = (bool (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x4EB3B4);
    return _IsFiring(player);
}

static bool get_IsSighting(void *player) {
    bool (*_get_IsSighting)(void *players) = (bool (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x4EAF78);
    return _get_IsSighting(player);
}

static void *get_HeadTF(void *player) {
    void *(*_get_HeadTF)(void *) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x4F2264);
    return _get_HeadTF(player);
}

static Vector3 WorldToScreenPoint(void *camera, Vector3 worldPos) {
    Vector3 (*_WorldToScreenPoint)(void *, Vector3) = (Vector3 (*)(void *, Vector3))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x17FE628);
    return _WorldToScreenPoint(camera, worldPos);
}

static bool get_isAlive(void *player) {
    bool (*_get_isAlive)(void *players) = (bool (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x4EFCA8);
    return _get_isAlive(player);
}

static void *Curent_Match() {
    void *(*_Curent_Match) (void *nuls) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xB263C8);
    return _Curent_Match(NULL);
}

static void *GetLocalPlayerOrObServer() {
    void *(*_GetLocalPlayerOrObServer)(void *players) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xB32CBC);
    return _GetLocalPlayerOrObServer(NULL);
}

static void *Current_Local_Player() {
    void *(*_Local_Player)(void *players) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xB325FC);
    return _Local_Player(NULL);
}

static void *get_MyFollowCamera(void *players) {
    void *(*_get_MyFollowCamera) (void *player) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x448FA4);
    return _get_MyFollowCamera(players);
}

static Vector3 Transform_INTERNAL_GetPosition(void *player) {
    Vector3 out = {0, 0, 0};
    void (*_Transform_INTERNAL_GetPosition)(void *transform, Vector3 * out) = (void (*)(void *, Vector3 *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x1AD2250);
    _Transform_INTERNAL_GetPosition(player, &out);
    return out;
}

static void *Component_GetTransform(void *player) {
    void *(*_Component_GetTransform)(void *component) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x1620524);
    return _Component_GetTransform(player);
}

static Vector3 GetForward(void *player) {
    Vector3 (*_GetForward)(void *players) = (Vector3 (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x1AD2934);
    return _GetForward(player);
}

static void set_aim(void *player, Quaternion look) {
    void (*_set_aim)(void *players, Quaternion lock) = (void (*)(void *, Quaternion))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x4FF960);
    _set_aim(player, look);
}

static void *Camera_main() {
    void *(*_Camera_main)(void *nuls) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x17FEC18);
    return _Camera_main(NULL);
}

// --- New Functions from dump.cs analysis ---

// Health Functions
static uint32_t get_Health(void *player) {
    uint32_t (*_get_Health)(void *players) = (uint32_t (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x58ECFC);
    return _get_Health(player);
}

static void set_Health(void *player, uint32_t health) {
    void (*_set_Health)(void *players, uint32_t val) = (void (*)(void *, uint32_t))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x58F59C);
    _set_Health(player, health);
}

// Speed Functions
static float GetRunSpeed(void *player) {
    float (*_GetRunSpeed)(void *players) = (float (*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xBF37C0);
    return _GetRunSpeed(player);
}

static void SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(void *player, int type, float scale) {
    void (*_SetSpecialRunSpeedScale)(void *players, int t, float s) = (void (*)(void *, int, float))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xBF3A38);
    _SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(player, type, scale);
}

// Vehicle Speed
static void LockMaxSpeed(void *vehicle, float speed) {
    void (*_LockMaxSpeed)(void *veh, float s) = (void (*)(void *, float))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x8A3CC4); // Using SyncState as reference or similar logic
    // Note: Offset 0x8A3CC4 was found near vehicle speed sync
}

// Ammo
static void SyncWeaponAmmoInClip(void *player, void *res) {
    void (*_SyncWeaponAmmoInClip)(void *p, void *r) = (void (*)(void *, void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xBF4921); // Adjusted from dump
}

// --- Mod Menu Logic Example ---

bool godMode = false;
bool fastRun = false;

void UpdateModMenu() {
    void *localPlayer = Current_Local_Player();
    if (localPlayer != NULL) {
        if (godMode) {
            set_Health(localPlayer, 9999);
        }
        if (fastRun) {
            SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(localPlayer, 1, 5.0f); // 5x Speed
        }
    }
}
